### Tweaks to Create (and addons)
This mod makes minor tweaks and changes to the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) mod and a few Addon mods. Features Implemented so far: 
- Recipe changes
- Diving boots negates the effect of levitation
- (More Coming soon?)

### Versions

Currently, only NeoForge 1.21.1 is supported for the Create 6 update. 1.20.1 (forge and fabric) will receive an update/version when the Create Fabric 6 update has been released.

### New Features

Features are 100% controlled by [Stam1o](https://www.youtube.com/@Stam1o) himself. To request new features, join the [Just Create SMP](https://discord.gg/dM46ckZ2Kv) or [Stam's Jam](https://discord.gg/Cy9wpgBSP2) discord servers.
